description: A quarantine line blocks the road. A tired guard points a cracked scanner at each traveler and sends the coughing ones toward a fenced tent.

options.summary_consequence: Accepted attrition because no prior leverage applied.

options.text: Show sterile clinic supplies and bypass the quarantine tent.
options.locked_text: You never got clean supplies from the clinic, so the guard has no reason to wave you through.
options.summary_consequence: Earlier safe clinic access created a later survival shortcut.

options.text: Talk the guard into believing your checkpoint story.
options.locked_text: The guard wants a story with official rhythm, and you cannot find it fast enough.
options.summary_consequence: Used social cover to avoid quarantine.

options.text: Answer the guard's scar-code like an old raider.
options.locked_text: The guard's scar pattern is a question, but you do not know the answer.
options.summary_consequence: Violent past opened a shortcut but made authority hostility plausible.
